"Walys" redirects here. For the Lord of Maidenpool during the Dance of the Dragons, see Walys Mooton.
Maester
Walys
Title Maester at Winterfell
Allegiances
  • House Hightower
  • The Citadel
  • House Stark
Culture Reach
Died or before 283 AC
Father Unknown archmaester
Mother Unknown Hightower
Book A Dance with Dragons (mentioned)

Walys, born Walys Flowers, was a maester of the Citadel.[1]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Recent History
    • 2.1 A Dance with Dragons
  • 3 Theories
  • 4 Quotes about Walys
  • 5 Family
  • 6 References

History[ ]

Walys was born a bastard son of a Hightower girl and an archmaester of the Citadel. After forging his chain, he served at Winterfell when Lord Rickard Stark was head of House Stark.[1]

Recent History[ ]

A Dance with Dragons[ ]

Lady Barbrey Dustin believes that Walys instigated Lord Rickard Stark's "southron ambitions", including the marriage of his son Brandon to Catelyn Tully, the daughter of the Lord Paramount of the Trident.[1]

Theories[ ]

Because of the personal items in Archmaester Walgrave's strongbox,[2] and the similarity of Walgrave's and Walys's names, some suspect he was the archmaester who fathered Walys.

Quotes about Walys[ ]

Once he forged his chain, his secret father and his friends wasted no time dispatching him to Winterfell to fill Lord Rickard's ears with poisoned words as sweet as honey. The Tully marriage was his notion, never doubt it, he—[1]

—Barbrey Dustin to Theon Greyjoy
